versions.manifest:
apiVersion: miabi.io/v1
kind: Template
metadata:
  name: goauthentik
  displayName: authentik
  version: 1.0.0
  description: Self-hosted identity provider — SSO, OAuth2/OIDC, SAML and LDAP — backed by PostgreSQL and Redis.
  category: Security
  icon: https://cdn.simpleicons.org/authentik
  homepage: https://goauthentik.io
  tags: [security, sso, identity, oauth, saml, oidc]
inputs:
  - key: secret_key
    label: Secret key
    help: Signing key for sessions and tokens. Leave blank to auto-generate.
    type: password
    generate: true
    length: 50
    required: true
  - key: bootstrap_email
    label: Initial admin email
    help: Email for the initial akadmin superuser created on first launch.
    type: string
    required: true
    default: admin@example.com
    pattern: '^[^@\s]+@[^@\s]+\.[^@\s]+$'
  - key: bootstrap_password
    label: Initial admin password
    help: Password for the initial akadmin superuser. Leave blank to auto-generate.
    type: password
    generate: true
    length: 24
    required: true
databases:
  - name: db
    engine: postgres
    version: "17-alpine"
    placement: auto
  - name: redis
    engine: redis
    version: "8-alpine"
    placement: dedicated
volumes:
  - name: media
# Shared across the server + worker: both processes need the same secret key and
# the same PostgreSQL/Redis connection, so they are declared once here instead of
# being repeated in every application.
stack:
  description: authentik identity provider — a server and a background worker sharing PostgreSQL and Redis.
  env:
    AUTHENTIK_SECRET_KEY: "{{ .inputs.secret_key }}"
    AUTHENTIK_POSTGRESQL__HOST: "{{ .databases.db.host }}"
    AUTHENTIK_POSTGRESQL__PORT: "{{ .databases.db.port }}"
    AUTHENTIK_POSTGRESQL__USER: "{{ .databases.db.user }}"
    AUTHENTIK_POSTGRESQL__PASSWORD: "{{ .databases.db.password }}"
    AUTHENTIK_POSTGRESQL__NAME: "{{ .databases.db.name }}"
    AUTHENTIK_REDIS__HOST: "{{ .databases.redis.host }}"
    AUTHENTIK_REDIS__PORT: "{{ .databases.redis.port }}"
    AUTHENTIK_REDIS__PASSWORD: "{{ .databases.redis.password }}"
  secretEnv:
    - AUTHENTIK_SECRET_KEY
    - AUTHENTIK_POSTGRESQL__PASSWORD
    - AUTHENTIK_REDIS__PASSWORD
applications:
  - name: server
    primary: true
    image: ghcr.io/goauthentik/server
    tag: "2025.10.2"
    command: ["server"]
    ports:
      - container: 9000
        scheme: http
    env:
      AUTHENTIK_BOOTSTRAP_EMAIL: "{{ .inputs.bootstrap_email }}"
      AUTHENTIK_BOOTSTRAP_PASSWORD: "{{ .inputs.bootstrap_password }}"
    secretEnv:
      - AUTHENTIK_BOOTSTRAP_PASSWORD
    mounts:
      - volume: media
        path: /media
    healthcheck:
      type: http
      path: /-/health/live/
      port: 9000
      intervalSeconds: 30
      timeoutSeconds: 5
      retries: 3
      startPeriodSeconds: 30
  - name: worker
    image: ghcr.io/goauthentik/server
    tag: "2025.10.2"
    command: ["worker"]
    mounts:
      - volume: media
        path: /media

apiVersion: miabi.io/v1
kind: Template
metadata:
  name: forgejo
  displayName: Forgejo
  version: 1.0.0
  description: Self-hosted lightweight software forge (Gitea soft-fork), backed by PostgreSQL.
  category: Development
  icon: https://cdn.simpleicons.org/forgejo
  homepage: https://forgejo.org
  tags: [git, vcs, devops]
databases:
  - name: db
    engine: postgres
    version: "17-alpine"
    placement: auto
volumes:
  - name: data
applications:
  - name: forgejo
    primary: true
    image: codeberg.org/forgejo/forgejo
    tag: "15"
    ports:
      - container: 3000
        scheme: http
    env:
      USER_UID: "1000"
      USER_GID: "1000"
      FORGEJO__database__DB_TYPE: postgres
      FORGEJO__database__HOST: "{{ .databases.db.host }}:{{ .databases.db.port }}"
      FORGEJO__database__NAME: "{{ .databases.db.name }}"
      FORGEJO__database__USER: "{{ .databases.db.user }}"
      FORGEJO__database__PASSWD: "{{ .databases.db.password }}"
      # DB is wired via env, so skip the first-run installer; the first registered
      # account becomes the site administrator.
      FORGEJO__security__INSTALL_LOCK: "true"
    secretEnv:
      - FORGEJO__database__PASSWD
    mounts:
      - volume: data
        path: /data

apiVersion: miabi.io/v1
kind: Template
metadata:
  name: freshrss
  displayName: FreshRSS
  version: 1.0.0
  description: Self-hosted, lightweight RSS/Atom feed aggregator (SQLite-backed).
  category: News
  icon: https://cdn.simpleicons.org/freshrss
  homepage: https://freshrss.org
  tags: [rss, news, feeds, reader]
inputs:
  - key: timezone
    label: Timezone
    help: IANA timezone used for feed timestamps and the cron refresh.
    type: string
    default: UTC
volumes:
  - name: data
applications:
  - name: freshrss
    primary: true
    image: freshrss/freshrss
    tag: "1.24.3"
    ports:
      - container: 80
        scheme: http
    env:
      TZ: "{{ .inputs.timezone }}"
      CRON_MIN: "*/20"
    mounts:
      - volume: data
        path: /var/www/FreshRSS/data
    healthcheck:
      type: http
      path: /
      port: 80
      intervalSeconds: 30
      timeoutSeconds: 5
      retries: 3
      startPeriodSeconds: 15

apiVersion: miabi.io/v1
kind: Template
metadata:
  name: ghost
  displayName: Ghost
  version: 1.2.0
  description: Professional publishing platform — a headless Node.js CMS for blogs and newsletters.
  category: CMS
  icon: https://cdn.simpleicons.org/ghost
  homepage: https://ghost.org
  author:
    name: Miabi
    email: community@miabi.io
    website: https://miabi.io
  tags: [blog, cms, publishing, newsletter]
  minMiabi: "0.5.0"

# Questions asked in the install wizard. Referenced below as {{ .inputs.<key> }}.
inputs:
  - key: site_url
    label: Public URL
    help: The full URL your blog will be served on (used for links and webhooks).
    type: string
    required: true
    pattern: "^https?://"
    placeholder: https://blog.example.com

# Logical database dependency. placement: auto -> reuse a compatible MySQL
# instance if one exists, else provision a dedicated one; either way Ghost gets
# its own scoped database + user. Tokens resolve identically regardless.
databases:
  - name: db
    engine: mysql
    version: "8.4"
    placement: auto

# Managed volume holding Ghost's content (images, themes, settings).
volumes:
  - name: content

applications:
  - name: ghost
    primary: true
    image: ghost
    tag: "6.45-alpine"
    ports:
      - container: 2368
        scheme: http
    env:
      NODE_ENV: production
      url: "{{ .inputs.site_url }}"
      database__client: mysql
      database__connection__host: "{{ .databases.db.host }}"
      database__connection__port: "{{ .databases.db.port }}"
      database__connection__user: "{{ .databases.db.user }}"
      database__connection__password: "{{ .databases.db.password }}"
      database__connection__database: "{{ .databases.db.name }}"
    secretEnv:
      - database__connection__password
    mounts:
      - volume: content
        path: /var/lib/ghost/content
    resources:
      memory: 512Mi
      cpu: 0.5
    healthcheck:
      type: http
      path: /
      port: 2368
      intervalSeconds: 30
      timeoutSeconds: 5
      retries: 3
      startPeriodSeconds: 20

apiVersion: miabi.io/v1
kind: Template
metadata:
  name: gitea
  displayName: Gitea
  version: 1.0.0
  description: Lightweight self-hosted Git service, backed by PostgreSQL.
  category: Development
  icon: https://cdn.simpleicons.org/gitea
  homepage: https://gitea.io
  tags: [git, vcs, devops]
databases:
  - name: db
    engine: postgres
    version: "17-alpine"
    placement: auto
volumes:
  - name: data
applications:
  - name: gitea
    primary: true
    image: gitea/gitea
    tag: "1.26"
    ports:
      - container: 3000
        scheme: http
    env:
      USER_UID: "1000"
      USER_GID: "1000"
      GITEA__database__DB_TYPE: postgres
      GITEA__database__HOST: "{{ .databases.db.host }}:{{ .databases.db.port }}"
      GITEA__database__NAME: "{{ .databases.db.name }}"
      GITEA__database__USER: "{{ .databases.db.user }}"
      GITEA__database__PASSWD: "{{ .databases.db.password }}"
      # DB is wired via env, so skip the first-run installer; the first registered
      # account becomes the site administrator.
      GITEA__security__INSTALL_LOCK: "true"
    secretEnv:
      - GITEA__database__PASSWD
    mounts:
      - volume: data
        path: /data

apiVersion: miabi.io/v1
kind: Template
metadata:
  name: grafana
  displayName: Grafana
  version: 1.0.0
  description: Open-source observability platform for dashboards, metrics, logs and alerting.
  category: Monitoring
  icon: https://cdn.simpleicons.org/grafana
  homepage: https://grafana.com
  tags: [monitoring, dashboards, metrics, observability]
inputs:
  - key: admin_password
    label: Admin password
    help: Password for the initial admin account. Leave blank to auto-generate.
    type: password
    generate: true
    length: 24
    required: true
volumes:
  - name: data
applications:
  - name: grafana
    primary: true
    image: grafana/grafana
    tag: "11.4.0"
    ports:
      - container: 3000
        scheme: http
    env:
      GF_SECURITY_ADMIN_USER: admin
      GF_SECURITY_ADMIN_PASSWORD: "{{ .inputs.admin_password }}"
    secretEnv:
      - GF_SECURITY_ADMIN_PASSWORD
    mounts:
      - volume: data
        path: /var/lib/grafana
    healthcheck:
      type: http
      path: /api/health
      port: 3000
      intervalSeconds: 30
      timeoutSeconds: 5
      retries: 3
      startPeriodSeconds: 15

apiVersion: miabi.io/v1
kind: Template
metadata:
  name: jellyfin
  displayName: Jellyfin

  description: Free, self-hosted media server for streaming your movies, shows and music.

apiVersion: miabi.io/v1
kind: Template
metadata:
  name: libsql
  displayName: libSQL
  version: 1.0.0
  description: Managed libSQL (sqld) database.
  category: Database
  icon: https://cdn.simpleicons.org/sqlite
  homepage: https://github.com/tursodatabase/libsql
  tags: [database, sql, sqlite]
databases:
  - name: libsql
    engine: libsql
    version: "latest"
    placement: dedicated

apiVersion: miabi.io/v1
kind: Template
metadata:
  name: matomo
  displayName: Matomo
  version: 1.0.0
  description: Privacy-respecting, self-hosted web analytics — a Google Analytics alternative, backed by MariaDB.
  category: Analytics
  icon: https://cdn.simpleicons.org/matomo
  homepage: https://matomo.org
  tags: [analytics, privacy, statistics]
databases:
  - name: db
    engine: mariadb
    version: "11.4"
    placement: auto
volumes:
  - name: data
applications:
  - name: matomo
    primary: true
    image: matomo
    tag: "5-apache"
    ports:
      - container: 80
        scheme: http
    env:
      MATOMO_DATABASE_ADAPTER: mysql
      MATOMO_DATABASE_HOST: "{{ .databases.db.host }}"
      MATOMO_DATABASE_USERNAME: "{{ .databases.db.user }}"
      MATOMO_DATABASE_PASSWORD: "{{ .databases.db.password }}"
      MATOMO_DATABASE_DBNAME: "{{ .databases.db.name }}"
    secretEnv:
      - MATOMO_DATABASE_PASSWORD
    mounts:
      - volume: data
        path: /var/www/html

apiVersion: miabi.io/v1
kind: Template
metadata:
  name: mealie
  displayName: Mealie
  version: 1.0.0
  description: Self-hosted recipe manager and meal planner with a shopping-list, backed by PostgreSQL.
  category: Productivity
  icon: https://cdn.simpleicons.org/mealie
  homepage: https://mealie.io
  tags: [productivity, recipes, meal-planning, cooking]
inputs:
  - key: base_url
    label: Public URL
    help: The public URL Mealie is served on (used for links and invitations).
    type: string
    required: true
    pattern: "^https?://"
    placeholder: https://recipes.example.com
databases:
  - name: db
    engine: postgres
    version: "17-alpine"
    placement: auto
volumes:
  - name: data
applications:
  - name: mealie
    primary: true
    image: ghcr.io/mealie-recipes/mealie
    tag: "v2.6.0"
    ports:
      - container: 9000
        scheme: http
    env:
      BASE_URL: "{{ .inputs.base_url }}"
      DB_ENGINE: postgres
      POSTGRES_SERVER: "{{ .databases.db.host }}"
      POSTGRES_PORT: "{{ .databases.db.port }}"
      POSTGRES_USER: "{{ .databases.db.user }}"
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: "{{ .databases.db.password }}"
      POSTGRES_DB: "{{ .databases.db.name }}"
    secretEnv:
      - POSTGRES_PASSWORD
    mounts:
      - volume: data
        path: /app/data
    healthcheck:
      type: http
      path: /api/app/about
      port: 9000
      intervalSeconds: 30
      timeoutSeconds: 5
      retries: 3
      startPeriodSeconds: 20

apiVersion: miabi.io/v1
kind: Template

  category: Analytics
  icon: https://cdn.simpleicons.org/metabase
  homepage: https://www.metabase.com
  tags: [analytics, business-intelligence, dashboards, sql]
databases:
  - name: db
    engine: postgres
    version: "17-alpine"
    placement: auto
applications:
  - name: metabase
    primary: true
    image: metabase/metabase
    tag: "v0.52.8"
    ports:
      - container: 3000
        scheme: http
    env:
      MB_DB_TYPE: postgres
      MB_DB_HOST: "{{ .databases.db.host }}"
      MB_DB_PORT: "{{ .databases.db.port }}"
      MB_DB_USER: "{{ .databases.db.user }}"
      MB_DB_PASS: "{{ .databases.db.password }}"
      MB_DB_DBNAME: "{{ .databases.db.name }}"
    secretEnv:
      - MB_DB_PASS
    healthcheck:
      type: http
      path: /api/health
      port: 3000
      intervalSeconds: 30
      timeoutSeconds: 5
      retries: 3
      startPeriodSeconds: 60

apiVersion: miabi.io/v1
kind: Template
metadata:
  name: minio
  displayName: MinIO
  version: 1.0.0
  description: High-performance, S3-compatible object storage with a built-in web console.
  category: Storage
  icon: https://cdn.simpleicons.org/minio
  homepage: https://min.io
  tags: [storage, s3, object-storage]
inputs:
  - key: root_user
    label: Root user
    help: The object-storage administrator username (3+ characters).
    type: string
    default: minioadmin
    required: true
  - key: root_password
    label: Root password
    help: Administrator secret key (8+ characters). Leave blank to auto-generate.
    type: password
    generate: true
    length: 24
    required: true
volumes:
  - name: data
applications:
  - name: minio
    primary: true
    image: minio/minio
    tag: "RELEASE.2025-04-22T22-12-26Z"
    command: ["server", "/data", "--console-address", ":9001"]
    ports:
      - container: 9000
        scheme: http
      - container: 9001
        scheme: http
    env:
      MINIO_ROOT_USER: "{{ .inputs.root_user }}"
      MINIO_ROOT_PASSWORD: "{{ .inputs.root_password }}"
    secretEnv:
      - MINIO_ROOT_PASSWORD
    mounts:
      - volume: data
        path: /data
    healthcheck:
      type: http
      path: /minio/health/live
      port: 9000
      intervalSeconds: 30
      timeoutSeconds: 5
      retries: 3
      startPeriodSeconds: 15

apiVersion: miabi.io/v1
kind: Template
metadata:
  name: mongo-express
  displayName: Mongo Express
  version: 1.0.0
  description: Web interface to administer MongoDB databases.
  category: Database
  icon: https://cdn.simpleicons.org/mongodb
  homepage: https://github.com/mongo-express/mongo-express
  author:
    name: Miabi
    email: community@miabi.io
    website: https://miabi.io
  tags: [database, mongodb, nosql, admin, tools]

# Mongo Express connects to one MongoDB server. Paste the instance's connection
# string (from its Credentials page) so it can reach the server by its in-network
# alias; the web UI is protected by its own basic-auth login.
inputs:
  - key: mongodb_url
    label: MongoDB connection string
    help: From the MongoDB instance's Credentials page, e.g. mongodb://admin:password@mb-db-xxxx:27017/?authSource=admin
    type: password
    required: true
    placeholder: mongodb://admin:password@host:27017/?authSource=admin
  - key: ui_username
    label: UI username
    help: Username for the Mongo Express login.
    type: string
    default: admin
    required: true
  - key: ui_password
    label: UI password
    help: Password for the Mongo Express login. Leave blank to auto-generate.
    type: password
    generate: true

applications:
  - name: mongo-express
    primary: true
    image: mongo-express
    tag: "1.0.2-20"
    ports:
      - container: 8081
        scheme: http
    env:
      ME_CONFIG_MONGODB_URL: "{{ .inputs.mongodb_url }}"
      ME_CONFIG_MONGODB_ENABLE_ADMIN: "true"
      ME_CONFIG_BASICAUTH_USERNAME: "{{ .inputs.ui_username }}"
      ME_CONFIG_BASICAUTH_PASSWORD: "{{ .inputs.ui_password }}"
    secretEnv:
      - ME_CONFIG_MONGODB_URL
      - ME_CONFIG_BASICAUTH_PASSWORD
    resources:
      memory: 256Mi
      cpu: 0.5

apiVersion: miabi.io/v1
kind: Template
metadata:
  name: mongodb
  displayName: MongoDB
  version: 1.0.0
  description: Managed MongoDB document database.
  category: Database
  icon: https://cdn.simpleicons.org/mongodb

databases:
  - name: mongodb
    engine: mongodb
    version: "7.0"
    placement: dedicated

apiVersion: miabi.io/v1
kind: Template
metadata:
  name: mysql
  displayName: MySQL
  version: 1.0.0
  description: Managed MySQL database.
  category: Database
  icon: https://cdn.simpleicons.org/mysql
  homepage: https://www.mysql.com
  tags: [database, sql]
databases:
  - name: mysql
    engine: mysql
    version: "8.4"
    placement: dedicated

apiVersion: miabi.io/v1
kind: Template
metadata:
  name: n8n
  displayName: n8n
  version: 1.0.0
  description: Workflow automation (standalone, SQLite).
  category: Automation
  icon: https://cdn.simpleicons.org/n8n
  homepage: https://n8n.io
  tags: [automation, workflow, no-code]
volumes:
  - name: data
applications:
  - name: n8n
    image: n8nio/n8n
    tag: "1.123.59"
    ports:
      - container: 5678
        scheme: http
    env:
      N8N_PORT: "5678"
      GENERIC_TIMEZONE: UTC
    mounts:
      - volume: data
        path: /home/node/.n8n

apiVersion: miabi.io/v1
kind: Template
metadata:
  name: nextcloud
  displayName: Nextcloud
  version: 1.0.0
  description: Self-hosted content collaboration platform — files, calendar and contacts, backed by PostgreSQL.
  category: Productivity
  icon: https://cdn.simpleicons.org/nextcloud
  homepage: https://nextcloud.com
  tags: [cloud, storage, files, collaboration]
inputs:
  - key: admin_user
    label: Admin username
    help: The initial administrator account created on first launch.
    type: string
    default: admin
    required: true
  - key: admin_password
    label: Admin password
    help: Leave blank to auto-generate a strong password.
    type: password
    generate: true
    length: 24
    required: true
databases:
  - name: db
    engine: postgres
    version: "17-alpine"
    placement: auto
volumes:
  - name: data
applications:
  - name: nextcloud
    primary: true
    image: nextcloud
    tag: "34-apache"
    ports:
      - container: 80
        scheme: http
    env:
      POSTGRES_HOST: "{{ .databases.db.host }}:{{ .databases.db.port }}"
      POSTGRES_DB: "{{ .databases.db.name }}"
      POSTGRES_USER: "{{ .databases.db.user }}"
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: "{{ .databases.db.password }}"
      NEXTCLOUD_ADMIN_USER: "{{ .inputs.admin_user }}"
      NEXTCLOUD_ADMIN_PASSWORD: "{{ .inputs.admin_password }}"
    secretEnv:
      - POSTGRES_PASSWORD
      - NEXTCLOUD_ADMIN_PASSWORD
    mounts:
      - volume: data
        path: /var/www/html

apiVersion: miabi.io/v1
kind: Template
metadata:
  name: nginx
  displayName: Nginx
  version: 1.0.0
  description: Lightweight web server / static site.
  category: Web
  icon: https://cdn.simpleicons.org/nginx
  homepage: https://nginx.org
  tags: [web, server, static]
applications:
  - name: nginx
    image: nginx
    tag: 1.30-alpine
    ports:
      - container: 80
        scheme: http

apiVersion: miabi.io/v1
kind: Template
metadata:
  name: pgadmin4
  displayName: pgAdmin 4
  version: 1.0.0
  description: Web interface to administer PostgreSQL databases.
  category: Database
  icon: https://cdn.simpleicons.org/postgresql
  homepage: https://www.pgadmin.org
  author:
    name: Miabi
    email: community@miabi.io
    website: https://miabi.io
  tags: [database, postgres, admin, tools]

inputs:
  - key: email
    label: Admin email
    help: Login email for the pgAdmin web interface.
    type: string
    required: true
    pattern: "^[^@\\s]+@[^@\\s]+$"
    placeholder: admin@example.com
  - key: password
    label: Admin password
    help: Login password for the pgAdmin web interface. Leave blank to auto-generate.
    type: password
    generate: true

# Holds pgAdmin's configuration database (registered servers, preferences).
volumes:
  - name: data

applications:
  - name: pgadmin
    primary: true
    image: dpage/pgadmin4
    tag: "8.14"
    ports:
      - container: 80
        scheme: http
    env:
      PGADMIN_DEFAULT_EMAIL: "{{ .inputs.email }}"
      PGADMIN_DEFAULT_PASSWORD: "{{ .inputs.password }}"
      PGADMIN_LISTEN_PORT: "80"
    secretEnv:
      - PGADMIN_DEFAULT_PASSWORD
    mounts:
      - volume: data
        path: /var/lib/pgadmin
    resources:
      memory: 512Mi
      cpu: 0.5
    healthcheck:
      type: http
      path: /misc/ping
      port: 80
      intervalSeconds: 30
      timeoutSeconds: 5
      retries: 3
      startPeriodSeconds: 20

apiVersion: miabi.io/v1
kind: Template
metadata:
  name: phpmyadmin
  displayName: phpMyAdmin
  version: 1.0.0
  description: Web interface to administer MySQL and MariaDB databases.
  category: Database
  icon: https://cdn.simpleicons.org/phpmyadmin
  homepage: https://www.phpmyadmin.net
  author:
    name: Miabi
    email: community@miabi.io
    website: https://miabi.io
  tags: [database, mysql, mariadb, admin, tools]

# Connects to any MySQL/MariaDB server in the workspace: PMA_ARBITRARY lets you
# enter the target instance's host (its in-network alias) on the login screen, so
# no specific database dependency is wired here.
applications:
  - name: phpmyadmin
    primary: true
    image: phpmyadmin
    tag: "5.2-apache"
    ports:
      - container: 80
        scheme: http
    env:
      PMA_ARBITRARY: "1"
      UPLOAD_LIMIT: 256M
    resources:
      memory: 256Mi
      cpu: 0.5
    healthcheck:
      type: http
      path: /
      port: 80
      intervalSeconds: 30
      timeoutSeconds: 5
      retries: 3
      startPeriodSeconds: 15

apiVersion: miabi.io/v1
kind: Template
metadata:
  name: posta
  displayName: Posta
  version: 1.0.0
  description: Self-hosted transactional email & SMTP platform — send, receive, and verify email.
  category: Email
  icon: https://github.com/goposta.png
  homepage: https://github.com/goposta/posta
  author:
    name: Jonas Kaninda
    email: me@jkaninda.dev
    website: https://goposta.org
  tags: [email, smtp, transactional, mail, self-hosted]
  minMiabi: "0.5.0"

inputs:
  - key: web_url
    label: Public URL
    help: The public base URL Posta is served on (used for links, OAuth callbacks, and the API server list).
    type: string
    required: true
    pattern: "^https?://"
    placeholder: https://posta.example.com
  - key: admin_email
    label: Admin email
    help: Email of the initial admin account.
    type: string
    required: true
    default: admin@example.com
    pattern: '^[^@\s]+@[^@\s]+\.[^@\s]+$'
  - key: admin_password
    label: Admin password
    help: Password for the initial admin account. Choose a strong value.
    type: password
    required: true
  - key: jwt_secret
    label: JWT secret
    help: Signing key for auth tokens. Leave blank to auto-generate.
    type: password
    generate: true
  - key: encryption_key
    label: Encryption key
    help: AES-256-GCM key used to encrypt stored SMTP passwords. Leave blank to auto-generate.
    type: password
    generate: true
    length: 32

databases:
  - name: db
    engine: postgres
    version: "17-alpine"
    placement: auto
  - name: redis
    engine: redis
    version: "8-alpine"
    placement: dedicated

applications:
  - name: posta
    primary: true
    image: jkaninda/posta
    tag: "0.11.0"
    ports:
      - container: 9000
        scheme: http
    env:
      POSTA_ENV: production
      POSTA_WEB_URL: "{{ .inputs.web_url }}"

      # Database (a managed PostgreSQL database, resolved by placement).
      POSTA_DB_HOST: "{{ .databases.db.host }}"
      POSTA_DB_PORT: "{{ .databases.db.port }}"
      POSTA_DB_USER: "{{ .databases.db.user }}"
      POSTA_DB_PASSWORD: "{{ .databases.db.password }}"
      POSTA_DB_NAME: "{{ .databases.db.name }}"

      # Redis (a dedicated managed instance — Miabi sets a password on it).
      POSTA_REDIS_ADDR: "{{ .databases.redis.host }}:{{ .databases.redis.port }}"
      POSTA_REDIS_PASSWORD: "{{ .databases.redis.password }}"

      # Security.
      POSTA_JWT_SECRET: "{{ .inputs.jwt_secret }}"
      POSTA_ENCRYPTION_KEY: "{{ .inputs.encryption_key }}"
      POSTA_ADMIN_EMAIL: "{{ .inputs.admin_email }}"
      POSTA_ADMIN_PASSWORD: "{{ .inputs.admin_password }}"

      # Worker (run embedded in the server process).
      POSTA_EMBEDDED_WORKER: "true"
      POSTA_WORKER_CONCURRENCY: "10"
      POSTA_WORKER_MAX_RETRIES: "5"

      # Email verification endpoint (results cached in Redis).
      POSTA_EMAIL_VERIFY_ENABLED: "true"
      POSTA_EMAIL_VERIFY_CACHE_TTL_HOURS: "168"
      POSTA_EMAIL_VERIFY_MX_CACHE_TTL_HOURS: "24"
      POSTA_EMAIL_VERIFY_RATE_HOURLY: "1000"
    secretEnv:
      - POSTA_DB_PASSWORD
      - POSTA_REDIS_PASSWORD
      - POSTA_JWT_SECRET
      - POSTA_ENCRYPTION_KEY
      - POSTA_ADMIN_PASSWORD
    healthcheck:
      type: http
      path: /healthz
      port: 9000
      intervalSeconds: 30
      timeoutSeconds: 5
      retries: 3
      startPeriodSeconds: 10

apiVersion: miabi.io/v1
kind: Template
metadata:
  name: postgresql
  displayName: PostgreSQL
  version: 1.0.0
  description: Managed PostgreSQL database.
  category: Database
  icon: https://cdn.simpleicons.org/postgresql
  homepage: https://www.postgresql.org
  tags: [database, sql]
databases:
  - name: postgres
    engine: postgres
    version: "17-alpine"
    placement: dedicated

apiVersion: miabi.io/v1
kind: Template
metadata:
  name: redis
  displayName: Redis
  version: 1.0.0
  description: Managed Redis instance.
  category: Database
  icon: https://cdn.simpleicons.org/redis
  homepage: https://redis.io
  tags: [database, cache, key-value]
databases:
  - name: redis
    engine: redis
    version: "8-alpine"
    placement: dedicated

apiVersion: miabi.io/v1
kind: Template
metadata:
  name: roundcube
  displayName: Roundcube
  version: 1.0.0
  description: Browser-based IMAP webmail client, backed by PostgreSQL.
  category: Email
  icon: https://cdn.simpleicons.org/roundcube
  homepage: https://roundcube.net
  tags: [email, webmail, imap, smtp]
inputs:
  - key: imap_host
    label: IMAP server
    help: Your mail server's IMAP host. Prefix with ssl:// for implicit TLS (port 993) or tls:// for STARTTLS.
    type: string
    required: true
    placeholder: ssl://imap.example.com
  - key: imap_port
    label: IMAP port
    help: IMAP port — 993 for SSL/TLS, 143 for STARTTLS.
    type: number
    default: "993"
  - key: smtp_host
    label: SMTP server
    help: Your mail server's outgoing SMTP host. Prefix with tls:// for STARTTLS or ssl:// for implicit TLS.
    type: string
    required: true
    placeholder: tls://smtp.example.com
  - key: smtp_port
    label: SMTP port
    help: SMTP submission port — 587 for STARTTLS, 465 for SSL/TLS.
    type: number
    default: "587"
databases:
  - name: db
    engine: postgres
    version: "17-alpine"
    placement: auto
applications:
  - name: roundcube
    primary: true
    image: roundcube/roundcubemail
    tag: "1.6.11-apache"
    ports:
      - container: 80
        scheme: http
    env:
      ROUNDCUBEMAIL_DB_TYPE: pgsql
      ROUNDCUBEMAIL_DB_HOST: "{{ .databases.db.host }}"
      ROUNDCUBEMAIL_DB_PORT: "{{ .databases.db.port }}"
      ROUNDCUBEMAIL_DB_USER: "{{ .databases.db.user }}"
      ROUNDCUBEMAIL_DB_PASSWORD: "{{ .databases.db.password }}"
      ROUNDCUBEMAIL_DB_NAME: "{{ .databases.db.name }}"
      ROUNDCUBEMAIL_DEFAULT_HOST: "{{ .inputs.imap_host }}"
      ROUNDCUBEMAIL_DEFAULT_PORT: "{{ .inputs.imap_port }}"
      ROUNDCUBEMAIL_SMTP_SERVER: "{{ .inputs.smtp_host }}"
      ROUNDCUBEMAIL_SMTP_PORT: "{{ .inputs.smtp_port }}"
    secretEnv:
      - ROUNDCUBEMAIL_DB_PASSWORD
    healthcheck:
      type: http
      path: /
      port: 80
      intervalSeconds: 30
      timeoutSeconds: 5
      retries: 3
      startPeriodSeconds: 15

apiVersion: miabi.io/v1
kind: Template
metadata:
  name: umami
  displayName: Umami
  version: 1.0.0
  description: Privacy-focused web analytics backed by PostgreSQL.
  category: Analytics
  icon: https://cdn.simpleicons.org/umami
  homepage: https://umami.is
  tags: [analytics, privacy]
inputs:
  - key: app_secret
    label: App secret
    help: Secret used to sign tokens. Leave blank to auto-generate.
    type: password
    generate: true
databases:
  - name: db
    engine: postgres
    version: "17-alpine"
    placement: auto
applications:
  - name: umami
    primary: true
    image: ghcr.io/umami-software/umami
    tag: postgresql-v2.15.1
    ports:
      - container: 3000
        scheme: http
    env:
      DATABASE_TYPE: postgresql
      DATABASE_URL: "{{ .databases.db.uri }}"
      APP_SECRET: "{{ .inputs.app_secret }}"
    secretEnv:
      - DATABASE_URL
      - APP_SECRET

apiVersion: miabi.io/v1
kind: Template
metadata:
  name: uptime-kuma
  displayName: Uptime Kuma
  version: 1.0.0
  description: Self-hosted uptime monitoring with status pages and rich notifications.
  category: Monitoring
  icon: https://cdn.simpleicons.org/uptimekuma
  homepage: https://uptime.kuma.pet
  tags: [monitoring, uptime, status, alerting]
volumes:
  - name: data
applications:
  - name: uptime-kuma
    primary: true
    image: louislam/uptime-kuma
    tag: "1"
    ports:
      - container: 3001
        scheme: http
    mounts:
      - volume: data
        path: /app/data
    healthcheck:
      type: http
      path: /
      port: 3001
      intervalSeconds: 30
      timeoutSeconds: 5
      retries: 3
      startPeriodSeconds: 15

apiVersion: miabi.io/v1
kind: Template
metadata:
  name: vaultwarden
  displayName: Vaultwarden
  version: 1.0.0
  description: Lightweight Bitwarden-compatible password manager server (SQLite-backed).
  category: Security
  icon: https://cdn.simpleicons.org/vaultwarden
  homepage: https://github.com/dani-garcia/vaultwarden
  tags: [security, passwords, bitwarden, self-hosted]
inputs:
  - key: domain
    label: Public URL
    help: The public HTTPS URL Vaultwarden is served on. Required for WebAuthn / U2F and email links.
    type: string
    required: true
    pattern: "^https?://"
    placeholder: https://vault.example.com
  - key: admin_token
    label: Admin token
    help: Token guarding the /admin diagnostics panel. Leave blank to auto-generate.
    type: password
    generate: true
    length: 48
    required: true
  - key: signups_allowed
    label: Allow signups
    help: Allow new users to register. Disable once your accounts are created.
    type: select
    options: ["true", "false"]
    default: "true"
volumes:
  - name: data
applications:
  - name: vaultwarden
    primary: true
    image: vaultwarden/server
    tag: "1.34.1-alpine"
    ports:
      - container: 80
        scheme: http
    env:
      DOMAIN: "{{ .inputs.domain }}"
      ADMIN_TOKEN: "{{ .inputs.admin_token }}"
      SIGNUPS_ALLOWED: "{{ .inputs.signups_allowed }}"
      ROCKET_PORT: "80"
    secretEnv:
      - ADMIN_TOKEN
    mounts:
      - volume: data
        path: /data
    healthcheck:
      type: http
      path: /alive
      port: 80
      intervalSeconds: 30
      timeoutSeconds: 5
      retries: 3
      startPeriodSeconds: 10

apiVersion: miabi.io/v1
kind: Template
metadata:
  name: vikunja
  displayName: Vikunja
  version: 1.0.0
  description: Self-hosted to-do and project management app, backed by PostgreSQL.
  category: Productivity
  icon: https://cdn.simpleicons.org/vikunja
  homepage: https://vikunja.io
  tags: [productivity, todo, tasks, project-management]
inputs:
  - key: public_url
    label: Public URL
    help: The public URL Vikunja is served on (used by the frontend and for links).
    type: string
    required: true
    pattern: "^https?://"
    placeholder: https://tasks.example.com
  - key: jwt_secret
    label: JWT secret
    help: Signing key for auth tokens. Leave blank to auto-generate.
    type: password
    generate: true
    length: 32
databases:
  - name: db
    engine: postgres
    version: "17-alpine"
    placement: auto
volumes:
  - name: files
applications:
  - name: vikunja
    primary: true
    image: vikunja/vikunja
    tag: "0.24.6"
    ports:
      - container: 3456
        scheme: http
    env:
      VIKUNJA_SERVICE_PUBLICURL: "{{ .inputs.public_url }}"
      VIKUNJA_SERVICE_JWTSECRET: "{{ .inputs.jwt_secret }}"
      VIKUNJA_DATABASE_TYPE: postgres
      VIKUNJA_DATABASE_HOST: "{{ .databases.db.host }}"
      VIKUNJA_DATABASE_PORT: "{{ .databases.db.port }}"
      VIKUNJA_DATABASE_USER: "{{ .databases.db.user }}"
      VIKUNJA_DATABASE_PASSWORD: "{{ .databases.db.password }}"
      VIKUNJA_DATABASE_DATABASE: "{{ .databases.db.name }}"
    secretEnv:
      - VIKUNJA_SERVICE_JWTSECRET
      - VIKUNJA_DATABASE_PASSWORD
    mounts:
      - volume: files
        path: /app/vikunja/files

apiVersion: miabi.io/v1
kind: Template
metadata:
  name: wallabag
  displayName: Wallabag
  version: 1.0.0
  description: Self-hosted read-it-later app that saves and cleans up web articles, backed by PostgreSQL.
  category: Productivity
  icon: https://cdn.simpleicons.org/wallabag
  homepage: https://wallabag.org
  tags: [productivity, bookmarks, read-later, articles]
inputs:
  - key: domain_name
    label: Public URL
    help: The public URL Wallabag is served on (used for links and asset URLs).
    type: string
    required: true
    pattern: "^https?://"
    placeholder: https://read.example.com
databases:
  - name: db
    engine: postgres
    version: "17-alpine"
    placement: auto
volumes:
  - name: images
applications:
  - name: wallabag
    primary: true
    image: wallabag/wallabag
    tag: "2.6.10"
    ports:
      - container: 80
        scheme: http
    env:
      SYMFONY__ENV__DATABASE_DRIVER: pdo_pgsql
      SYMFONY__ENV__DATABASE_HOST: "{{ .databases.db.host }}"
      SYMFONY__ENV__DATABASE_PORT: "{{ .databases.db.port }}"
      SYMFONY__ENV__DATABASE_NAME: "{{ .databases.db.name }}"
      SYMFONY__ENV__DATABASE_USER: "{{ .databases.db.user }}"
      SYMFONY__ENV__DATABASE_PASSWORD: "{{ .databases.db.password }}"
      SYMFONY__ENV__DOMAIN_NAME: "{{ .inputs.domain_name }}"
    secretEnv:
      - SYMFONY__ENV__DATABASE_PASSWORD
    mounts:
      - volume: images
        path: /var/www/wallabag/web/assets/images

apiVersion: miabi.io/v1
kind: Template
metadata:
  name: wordpress
  displayName: WordPress
  version: 1.0.0
  description: WordPress CMS backed by MySQL.
  category: CMS
  icon: https://cdn.simpleicons.org/wordpress
  homepage: https://wordpress.org
  tags: [cms, blog, php]
databases:
  - name: db
    engine: mysql
    version: "8.4"
    placement: auto
volumes:
  - name: content
applications:
  - name: wordpress
    primary: true
    image: wordpress
    tag: "7.0-php8.3-apache"
    ports:
      - container: 80
        scheme: http
    env:
      WORDPRESS_DB_HOST: "{{ .databases.db.host }}"
      WORDPRESS_DB_USER: "{{ .databases.db.user }}"
      WORDPRESS_DB_PASSWORD: "{{ .databases.db.password }}"
      WORDPRESS_DB_NAME: "{{ .databases.db.name }}"
    secretEnv:
      - WORDPRESS_DB_PASSWORD
    mounts:
      - volume: content
        path: /var/www/html

apiVersion: miabi.io/v1
kind: Template
metadata:
  name: guestbook
  displayName: Guestbook
  version: 2.0.0
  description: A tiny self-hosted guestbook — Okapi (Go) + Postgres with live SSE updates, an online-user count, and a server-time card. The reference example for deploying to Miabi.
  category: Development
  icon: https://cdn.simpleicons.org/go
  homepage: https://github.com/miabi-io/guestbook
  author:
    name: Jonas Kaninda
    website: https://github.com/jkaninda
  tags: [example, go, okapi, guestbook, sse]
inputs:
  - key: app_name
    label: Display name
    help: Shown in the guestbook header and health payload.
    type: string
    default: Miabi Guestbook
databases:
  - name: db
    engine: postgres
    version: "17-alpine"
    placement: auto
applications:
  - name: guestbook
    primary: true
    image: miabi/guestbook
    tag: "2.0.0"
    ports:
      - container: 8080
        scheme: http
    env:
      DATABASE_URL: "{{ .databases.db.uri }}"
      APP_NAME: "{{ .inputs.app_name }}"
    secretEnv:
      - DATABASE_URL
    healthcheck:
      type: http
      path: /healthz
      port: 8080

apiVersion: miabi.io/v1
kind: Template
metadata:
  name: okapi-example
  displayName: Okapi Example
  version: 1.0.0
  description: Reference app for the Okapi Go API framework — middleware, routing, real-time SSE, and auto-generated OpenAPI docs at /docs.
  category: Development
  icon: https://cdn.simpleicons.org/go
  homepage: https://github.com/jkaninda/okapi-example
  author:
    name: Jonas Kaninda
    website: https://github.com/jkaninda
  tags: [api, go, okapi, example]
inputs:
  - key: jwt_secret
    label: JWT secret
    help: Used to sign tokens. Leave blank to auto-generate a strong secret.
    type: password
    generate: true
applications:
  - name: okapi-example
    image: jkaninda/okapi-example
    tag: latest
    ports:
      - container: 8080
        scheme: http
    env:
      JWT_SECRET: "{{ .inputs.jwt_secret }}"
      ENABLE_DOCS: "true"
    secretEnv: [JWT_SECRET]
    healthcheck:
      type: http
      path: /
      port: 8080
